Motion To Compel Deft Wong'S Discovery Responses & For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-14-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Defendant Dut Wing Wong's Discovery Responses is granted. Defendant is ordered to respond within 10 days of notice of this order. By this order, the court is not determining that any privileges have been waived. However, it is not adequate to say that Defendant is awaiting permission from his criminal defense attorney. Plaintiff's motion seeking a protective order should have been made some time ago. The court finds the failure to respond is a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $700, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. (612/HEWLETT)
